## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and the root cause. Link the issue with
`Fixes #...` when applicable.

## Scope and compatibility

- Contracts, state, storage, protocol, CLI, GUI, TUI, or installation behavior changed:
- Backward-compatibility or migration risk:
- Explicitly out of scope:

## Evidence

- [ ] A regression test fails without the fix and passes with it, or this is not a bug fix.
- [ ] The owning unit/business/OS/release/live/UI flow is covered.
- [ ] Exact verification commands and summarized results are listed below.
- [ ] Documentation and known-issue/roadmap status are updated where needed.

Commands and results:

```text
command -> result
```

## Performance or efficiency changes

- [ ] Not a performance/efficiency change.
- [ ] Baseline and candidate commits, hardware, OS, provider/model/settings, workload, warm-up, repetitions, raw results, variance, correctness, and thresholds are attached.
- [ ] End-to-end improvement is demonstrated; no correctness or reliability regression is hidden by the metric.

Before/after summary and artifact links:

## Test matrix

- Operating systems tested:
- Providers/models tested:
- Important cells not tested and why:

## Safety

- [ ] No credentials, private session data, provider logs, or generated local state are included.
- [ ] The change does not modify remote infrastructure, permissions, or billing settings.
